# mock_summarised_result { #cdmconnector.mock_summarised_result }

```python
mock_summarised_result(seed=1)
```

Create a mock summarised_result DataFrame for examples (mirrors visOmopResults mockSummarisedResult).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                         | Default   |
|--------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| seed   | int    | Random seed for reproducible mock data (default 1). | `1`       |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                                                                        |
|--------|------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Mock result with result_id, cdm_name, group_*, strata_*, variable_*, estimate_name, estimate_type, estimate_value. |
